start_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD to begin the first sync from. Defaults to 2 days ago.
start_date.title: Start Date

end_date.description: YYYY-MM-DD (inclusive) to stop pulling at. Leave empty to keep pulling up to the current day. Set it only for a bounded historical backfill.
end_date.title: End Date

lookback_days.description: Re-pull this many days before the cursor each run to catch late-arriving data. Duplicates are deduped by event_id.
lookback_days.title: Lookback Days

skip_invalid_events.description: If CleverTap rejects an event name as invalid, log a warning and continue with the next event instead of failing the whole capture.
skip_invalid_events.title: Skip Invalid Events

account_id.description: Value sent as the X-CleverTap-Account-Id header.
account_id.title: CleverTap Account ID

secret.description: Value sent as the X-CleverTap-Passcode header.
secret.title: CleverTap Passcode

event_names.description: CleverTap event names to pull (the connector fetches each one).
event_names.title: Event Names

api_base_url.description: Region-specific CleverTap events.json endpoint (eu1, us1, in1, ...).
api_base_url.title: API Base URL

timezone.description: Timezone used to derive the CleverTap from/to date range.
timezone.title: Timezone

resourceConfigSchema.description: ResourceConfig is a common resource configuration shape.

interval.description: Interval between updates for this resource
interval.title: Interval

resourceConfigSchema.title: ResourceConfig
